docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ASBY,CURTIS L. AS TO DEFENDANT CORNELL,OLIVER P.-CORNELL,BOKELMANN ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00

CERTIFIED MAIL TO OLIVER CORNELL RETURNED UNCLAIMED
